name: Facebook
description: Facebook Graph API client and GraphQL wrapper. Fetch objects, edges, and page insights from the Facebook Graph API.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Get a Facebook Graph API object by ID. Returns fields specified in the fields parameter.

object_id.description: The Facebook object ID to retrieve (e.g. 'me' or a numeric page/user ID).

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to request (e.g. 'id,name,email').

tools.name: get_edge
tools.description: Get an edge for a Facebook Graph API node (e.g. posts, photos, feed).

tools.name: get_page_insights
tools.description: Fetch page insights (impressions, engagement, etc.) for a Facebook Page via the GraphQL API.

page_id.description: The Facebook Page ID to query insights for.

metrics.description: Comma-separated metrics to retrieve (e.g. 'page_impressions,page_engaged_users'). Defaults to page_impressions,page_engaged_users.
